Fang Amulet of Calling  
 

Lore Item
Slot: NECK
Charges: 5
AC: 6
WIS: +2 MANA: +15
Effect: Companion Spirit (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 35
WT: 0.1 Size: SMALL
Class: SHM
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Lore Item
Slot: NECK
Charges: 5
AC: 6
WIS: +2 MANA: +15
Effect: Companion Spirit (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 35
WT: 0.1 Size: SMALL
Class: SHM
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Stackable:No

The effect changed. Is now an (must equip. cast time: instant). Has 5 charges.
I was not able to cast effect with my lvl 34 Shammy.

# Dec 04 2002 at 3:07 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593966188800
4 posts
Baught this for my Shammy on Antonius Bayle in the Bazaar at 140pp there was someone also selling at 220pp .
Ok i hear someone saying it proc at lv 34 , might it proc at an earlier lv for someone with more Wiz, maybee it depends on mana?

whats the earliest lv for someone this has procc'd ?
▲ Page top
No
QuoteReply
# Jul 21 2002 at 7:07 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591772031573
15 posts
It must be equiped to be used (so only SHM can use) and the casting time is Instant.

#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 15 2002 at 7:58 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Hey can a warrior use the effect??????

Can you read? SHAMAN ONLY!
▲ Page top
A better option easier
QuoteReply
# Nov 16 2001 at 11:09 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592249478566
Scholar
84 posts
Chrysoberyl Talisman from Minotaur Elder in Guk has one more point of wis and 5 more mana and it's easier to get.
The 5 charges of summon companion spirit are essentially useless on this. If it was unlimited, that would be a different story.

We got one last night, if I remember correctly it dropped off the Construct of Sathir.
▲ Page top
Funny story
QuoteReply
# Aug 27 2001 at 12:53 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250419454
56 posts
Wanna tell you how I got this, very interesting

First

A_Warrior auction: WTS bags of stuffs Hail me
Me: Hail A_Warrior.

Inside the bags there are this fang and ebon war spear, which I really desired for.

Unfortunately I've only 100pp.
After some conversation...

A_Warrior: so no? Lotsa great shaman stuffs in here.
Me: Sorry just blew all my money in Alchemy this morning, do you accept trade? I wouldd like to trade my blackjack for your ebon war spear, I can throw in a 100plat for you also.

A_Warrior: Nah

A_Warrior is inspecting you.

A_Warrior: Ill trade the stuffs in here for the two Forest Loops you are wearing

Me: It better be an insane offer, I love this loops.

A_Warrior: Ill trade you this fang for both loops.

(Keep in mind, I really love to hang on to these loops, but the necklace ac. and wis is really tempting.)
Some conversations went by.

Me: How about this, Ill take the deal if you will trade me your ebon for my blackjack.

A_Warrior: and 100pp?

Me: let's cut loose the 100pp

A_Warrior: I'd rather have 100pp

Me: How about 5charges of sow potions

A_Warrior: How about 5charges of sow and 50pp

Me: DEAL, Let's do trade.

After the whole incidents, we both laughed our *** off. Couldnt resist saying that I felt like Wall-Street peeps.

8)

▲ Page top
Not a snow job if your smart
QuoteReply
# May 10 2001 at 6:04 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Imagine fighting a mob being level 34+ and your pet dies....your low on mana and health.... what are your choices 1. run like a sissy. or 2. use yer amulet for emergency <fast cast> pet and be able to finish it off.

Items with spells you can cast save you mana or are for emergency cases....one I had saved my life 5 times <1 per charge> so no not useless and not snowjob.
▲ Page top
pet
QuoteReply
# Mar 25 2001 at 12:26 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
it casts the shamans first pet, they get it at lvl 34, so the pet it summons is in the level range of 27s..
▲ Page top
RE: pet
QuoteReply
# Apr 07 2001 at 7:33 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Don't be fooled by this. My shaman is lvl 29 and a friend gave this necklace to me. My first attempt at using the effect gave me the stomach lurching response of "You are not high enough level to use this equipment" (or something to that effect) as the 3 ice goblins barreled down on me and my group. Needless to say, I was not thrilled. From what I understand, you need to be at least lvl 34 to use this item, and by the time you hit lvl 34 you can cast the spell to summon this pet anyway ... another Verant snowjob. Obviously, someone didn't think too much about the logistics when designing this item, especially considering that by the time you can get one on your own, you'll have a far better pet anyway. In the meantime, that 6 AC and 2 WIS aren't too bad ....

Njaal Stormhammer
E'ci server
▲ Page top
RE: pet
QuoteReply
# Sep 20 2002 at 7:01 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591771476410
15 posts
IMO, if you're at level 34, instant cast pet would absolutely rule. What? You don't want an emergency pet when the one you've summoned earlier dies?

Thing is, this thing'd probably proc at level, oh, 45...
